name: Mali GPU Optimization
description: Mali TBDR (Helio G100 / G57 MC2) performance tuning for Minecraft 26.1.2, designed to coexist with VulkanMod. Async occlusion culling, particle bandwidth caps, tick budgeting. No OpenGL injection.

custom.maligpu:target: Mali-G57 MC2 / MediaTek Helio G100 (Valhall, TBDR)
